panel.noContractTitle: The current component `{{component}}` has no contract. Please add contracts first.
panel.selectNodeFirst: Please select a node from the component tree first.
panel.selectNodeFirstCanvas: Please select a node from the component tree or canvas first.

errors.mustBeArrayJson: Property value must be a valid JSON array
errors.mustBeObjectJson: Property value must be a valid JSON object
errors.mustBeArrayJsonForType: Property value must be a valid JSON {{type}}
errors.propsMustBeObject: props must be a valid JSON object
errors.columnsMustBeArray: columns must be a valid JSON array
errors.propsColumnsMustBeArray: props.columns must be a valid JSON array
errors.styleMustBeObject: style must be a valid JSON object or expression string
errors.eventActionsMustBeArray: Event actions must be an array
errors.logicMustBeObject: logic must be a valid JSON object

empty.noProps: This component has no declared props.
empty.noColumns: No columns yet. Click "Add Column" to create one.
empty.noEvents: No events on the current node. Click "Add" to add onClick first.

props.batchEditHint: Batch edit props. Changes are patched on blur.

style.supportHint: Supports JSON object (e.g., { "display": "none" }) or expression string (e.g., {{state.dynamicStyle}}).

events.editHint: Edit ActionChain JSON directly. Changes are saved on blur.

logic.editHint: Editable fields: if / show / loop. Set to null to remove logic.
